async def factorybrainstatus_cmd(update, context):
 await update.message.reply_text("✅ /factorybrainstatus command working from AutoPilot Hub!")

app.add_handler(CommandHandler("factorybrainstatus", factorybrainstatus_cmd))

app.run_polling(drop_pending_updates=True)
